name: Hawaiian Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour two loaf pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and chopped nuts; stir until evenly mixed.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, vegetable oil, bananas, and vanilla extract until well combined.
5. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and serving. Makes 2 loaves.
